news.headline: Mainstream achieves commercial operations for Ckhúri wind farm in Chile
news.summary: Mainstream Renewable Power has announced that it has received commercial operations date (COD) certification for the Ckhúri Wind Farm from the National Electricity Coordinator. The project is located in Calama in the Antofagasta Region, Chile.

news.headline: Envision and Menderes join forces for 120 MW wind power project in Turkey
news.summary: Envision Energy has partnered with Menderes Tekstil for the Beğendik wind power project. The project, located in Edirne Province, Turkey, has an installed capacity of 120 MW. The project will deploy 15 units of Envision’s

news.headline: POWERGRID floats tender for 150 MW/300 MWh BESS project in Andhra Pradesh
news.summary: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has invited tender for design, supply, erection, testing and commissioning of a 150 MW/300 MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) project at Kalikiri in Andhra Pradesh. The package

news.headline: Fujiyama commissions solar panel manufacturing facility in Madhya Pradesh
news.summary: Fujiyama Power Systems Limited has commissioned a 2,000 MW solar panel manufacturing facility at Ratlam, Madhya Pradesh. The facility is part of the company’s greenfield manufacturing expansion programme, and has been planned with manufacturing capacities

news.headline: IGL invites bids to set up 200 MW solar project in Rajasthan
news.summary: Indraprastha Gas Limited (IGL) has invited bids for the setting up of a 200 MWdc (160 MWac) solar power project in Rajasthan. The project will also include an integrated battery energy storage system (BESS).  The

news.headline: OCI Energy and Arava Power sign agreement for 670 MWdc Texas solar project
news.summary: OCI Energy and Arava Power have signed a membership interest purchase agreement (MIPA) for the 670 MWdc La Salle Solar project. The project is located in La Salle County, Texas. Under the agreement, Arava Power

news.headline: NTPC invites bids for development of infrastructure at Pudimadaka green hydrogen hub
news.summary: NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a wholly owned subsidiary of NTPC Limited, has floated a tender inviting bids for the development of enabling infrastructure and related works for the green hydrogen hub at Pudimadaka, Andhra

news.headline: Gen2 Energy secures grid capacity for green hydrogen project in Norway
news.summary: Norway-based Gen2 Energy has secured a 150 MW grid capacity reservation for its green hydrogen project at Monstad in Åfjord municipality. This will strengthen the project’s power connectivity framework. The project will produce up to

news.headline: WABAG and PEAK announce Bio-CNG plant in Uttar Pradesh
news.summary: VA TECH WABAG LIMITED (WABAG) and PEAK Sustainability Ventures have launched a Bio-CNG plant in Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh. The project will be set up at a 70 million litres per day sewage treatment plant in

news.headline: HPCL announces financial results for FY 2025-26
news.summary: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has announced the results for the financial year (FY) 2025-26, ending March 31, 2026. The company’s revenue from operations stood at Rs 4,785.43 billion in FY 2025-26, registering a 2.62
